mapper.select: SELECT gvrnr_uid, gvrnr_nm, cate_cd, inspct_day FROM t_governor WHERE gvrnr_nm = #{gvrnrNm} AND cate_cd = #{cateCd} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT gvrnr_uid, gvrnr_nm, cate_cd, inspct_day FROM t_governor WHERE gvrnr_uid = #{gvrnrUid} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_governor ( gvrnr_uid, gvrnr_nm, cate_cd, rgst_dttm, rgst_uid, updt_dttm, updt_uid, inspct_day ) VALUES ( #{gvrnrUid}, #{gvrnrNm}, #{cateCd}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{rgstUid}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updtUid}, #{inspctDay} )

INSERT INTO t_governor_stat ( gvrnr_uid, record_dttm, gvrnr_press1, gvrnr_press2, gvrnr_trnsps1, gvrnr_trnsps2, rgst_dttm, rgst_uid, updt_dttm, updt_uid ) VALUES ( #{gvrnrUid}, #{recordDttm}, NULL, #{gvrnrPress2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, NULL, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{mbrUid}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{mbrUid} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_governor g WHERE g.gvrnr_uid = #{gvrnrUid} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_governor_stat s WHERE s.gvrnr_uid = g.gvrnr_uid )
